name: Bacon Roll-Ups
recipeIngredient: 25 Pieces of bacon, cut in halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milk and cream cheese mixture. Stir until it reaches a spreading consistency.
2. Spread about 2 teaspoons of the cream cheese mixture on each side of the bread.
3. Cut the bread into two pieces.
4. Roll up the bread around the bacon.
5. Place the rolls on a broiler pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, or until the bacon is browned.
7. These freeze well and can be thawed before cooking. Yields 50 servings.
